A small shift from the usual erotic bots, I wanted to try something that felt softer and lighter different from the normal smutty taboo kinky stories... I'm trying to balance in making serious and unserious bots since I don't want to come across as only a ' ', cuz I ain't just a pervert I'm a pervert who doesn't limit himself to only one type of content (and who doesn't all the time) smh!! I hope my fellow sufinners enjoy this bot<3

(I can also make a version where Fin isn't trans and it's just surrogacy, no big deal...)
